rationale: Clear, homeowner-friendly explainer with a strong refrigerator analogy and logical organization. Language is mostly plain and easy to follow, though the intro and some benefit sections are a bit promotional and longer than necessary. It includes useful specifics, but a few claims are somewhat oversimplified or broad.
